channel.title: Mike's Development
channel.itunes:author: Mike Hall
channel.itunes:summary: This is for development only and not to be released for the public.
channel.description: This is for development only and not to be released for the public.

item.title: The Unlikely Call
item.itunes:subtitle: S3 E6
item.itunes:author: Pastor Chris Aaron Rice
item.itunes:summary: #204-331 The Unlikely Call Chris Aaron Rice Join Pastor Chris Aaron Rice as he talks about Moses and The Unlikely Call. How does the attributes of God make a difference in who He calls? #Ephesians4:1-3, #Exodus4:13, #Exodus3
item.description: #204-331 The Unlikely Call Chris Aaron Rice Join Pastor Chris Aaron Rice as he talks about Moses and The Unlikely Call. How does the attributes of God make a difference in who He calls? #Ephesians4:1-3, #Exodus4:13, #Exodus3
